title: Nested or Conditional dropdown columns

posts.author: BrookeFossey (Brooke Fossey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We regularly need to classify businesses based on their ANZSIC code and subdivision for project reporting. It would be great if we could have interdependent columns where when we choose an ANZSIC code, we only get the options of the subcode in the next field, rather than having to scroll down over 100 different items.

What are you trying to achieve

This will stop people accidently assigning a subdivision that doesn’t exist in the parent section.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BrookeFossey if you are open to use a form for it and a 3rd party marketplace app, you can achieve that with SuperForm using the advanced filtering feature.
Following video will give you a direction how to set it up but feel free to email support@spot-nik.com for more information.
